creator: knu@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I suppose PREFIX should be changed from the default not to conflict 
with FreeBSD native stuff.  Would you consider that? 

By the way, you don't need to and shouldn't list manpages in pkg-plist. 
Read Porter's Handbook for details. 

P.S. Sorry for leaving this PR unreviewed..
